repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Department of Human Service Studies records

origination.label: Creator

did.physdesc: Correspondence, reports, pamphlets, minutes, directories, handbooks, newsletters, photographs.
did.abstract: Records of the Department of Human Service Studies, now the Department of Policy Analysis and Management.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: 1946 the Department of Home Economics Education was established in the College of Home Economics, today's College of Human Ecology. In 1969 the name was changed to Community Service Education and in 1978 the name was changed again to Human Service Studies. In 1997 the department merged with the Department of Consumer Economics and Housing to become the Department of Policy Analysis and Management.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Five Year Review material and Curriculum Committee minutes; also Department memos and correspondence, faculty meeting minutes, manuals, reports, and budget material.

emph.ref: Series I. Five-Year Review, graduate level
Series III. Department Memos and Correspondence
Series V. Department Publications and Reports
Series VI. Photographs and Tape Recording

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Department of Human Service Studies records, #23-24-2894. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
See also Cornell University Department of Consumer Economics and Housing records #23-23-2864
See also Cornell University Department of Policy Analysis and Management records #23-26-3006
